name: Beach Cabana Turquoise Bikini Mirror Selfie

input_prompt: beach cabana mirror selfie turquoise crochet bikini blonde hair raw smartphone photo

background: reflection of blue ocean visible in mirror

reve.prompt: Travel influencer photography in the style of raw unfiltered beach content, platinum blonde woman in turquoise crochet bikini, beach cabana driftwood mirror selfie, golden sunlight on tanned skin, luxury tropical aesthetic

grok-imagine.prompt: Beach cabana mirror selfie, woman with platinum blonde hair and blue eyes, tanned skin with sunscreen glow, turquoise crochet bikini white sarong, rustic driftwood mirror, sharp ocean and tropical plant background, bright golden sunlight, raw smartphone photo

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A beautiful young woman in her early 20s takes a mirror selfie in a luxury beach cabana. She has long wavy salt-textured platinum blonde hair and piercing bright blue eyes, with tanned skin glowing from sunscreen oil, visible pores, fine vellus hair (peach fuzz) on her arms and face, and water droplets on her skin. She has a playful pout expression. She wears a vibrant turquoise crochet bikini with visible knitted texture and a sheer white sarong tied at her waist. Sunglasses are perched on her head and she holds a smartphone with a cute case. She stands in front of a full-length rustic driftwood frame mirror, popping one hip to accentuate her curves. The background shows a sharp reflection of blue ocean, white sand, and tropical plant leaves with no bokeh blur. Bright natural golden sunlight creates specular highlights on her oily skin and water droplets, with sharp sunny shadows. The image has a raw smartphone photo aesthetic with visible ISO noise and slight film grain. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic texture throughout.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman with platinum blonde wavy hair and blue eyes taking mirror selfie in beach cabana, tanned skin with sunscreen glow and water droplets, wearing turquoise crochet bikini and white sarong, rustic driftwood frame mirror, sharp background showing ocean sand and tropical plants, bright golden sunlight with specular highlights, raw unfiltered travel influencer aesthetic, natural skin texture with visible pores, not over-processed or heavily filtered
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A young woman with long wavy platinum blonde hair and piercing blue eyes takes a mirror selfie in a luxury beach cabana. She has tanned skin with a sunscreen oil glow and water droplets, wearing a vibrant turquoise crochet bikini with a sheer white sarong tied at her waist. She stands in front of a full-length rustic driftwood frame mirror, popping one hip playfully. The background shows a sharp, in-focus view of blue ocean, white sand, and tropical plant leaves. Bright golden sunlight creates warm specular highlights on her skin. The aesthetic is raw and unfiltered like a travel influencer photo.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the bikini to coral pink while keeping the beach cabana setting, mirror, platinum blonde hair, and golden sunlight the same. Preserve the tanned skin with sunscreen glow.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed texture descriptions (crochet knit, driftwood rough, sheer sarong translucent), specific skin details (oil glow, vellus hair)
2_realism_anchors: 'visible pores and peach fuzz', 'sunscreen oil glow', 'water droplets', 'ISO noise and film grain', 'salt-textured hair'
3_technical_camera: 'f/11 deep DOF', 'ISO noise', 'film grain', 'chromatic aberration', 'sharp background'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents bokeh, blurry background, over-processed, plastic skin
5_spatial_consistency: clear mirror selfie pose with hip pop
6_lighting_storytelling: 'bright golden sunlight' = luxury beach vacation mood
7_background_sharpness: explicit SHARP BACKGROUND instruction with f/11 DOF
